mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.message_title, m.message_type, m.message_content, m.sender_id, u.nickname AS sender_name, m.priority, mu.read_status, mu.read_time, m.create_time FROM sys_message m LEFT JOIN sys_message_user mu ON m.id = mu.message_id AND mu.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND m.id = #{id} AND mu.receiver_id = #{receiverId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN m.message_type = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS system_count, SUM(CASE WHEN m.message_type = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS private_count, SUM(CASE WHEN m.message_type = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notice_count FROM sys_message m INNER JOIN sys_message_user mu ON m.id = mu.message_id WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND mu.del_flag = '0' AND mu.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND mu.read_status = '0' AND m.status = '0'
